headline: Guy's Keys Have Started 'Ghosting' Him, Only Appear When He's Already Late
summary: The keys are now 'non-committal' and only show up 'when it's inconvenient.'
fullBody: Jake McKeys has been ghosted by his own keys. 'They only appear when I'm already late,' Jake said. 'It's like they're laughing at me.' The keys have become 'non-committal.' Jake has tried to set boundaries. 'I asked them to be more reliable,' Jake said. 'They didn't respond.' Jake's keys are in 'a difficult phase.'
